emergencyToolkitHeading.desc: Greeting heading at the top of the Emergency Toolkit home tab.

emergencyToolkitSubheading.desc: Subheading under the toolkit heading on the Emergency home tab; recovery encouragement.

emergencyCallContact.desc: Label on the emergency-contact call button; {name} is the saved contact's name.

emergencyHaltShortLabel.desc: Short tile label for the HALT self-check tool (Hungry/Angry/Lonely/Tired). Keep the dotted acronym.

emergencyPuzzleTitle.desc: Tile label for the distraction puzzle mini-game on the Emergency home tab.

emergencyWeeklyCareSummaryDesc.en: Prepare a gentle report for therapy, support, or reflection.
emergencyWeeklyCareSummaryDesc.desc: Description under the Weekly Care Summary row on the Emergency home tab.

emergencyCalmToolkitOverline.desc: Small uppercase overline shown above breathing-screen titles. Keep it uppercase.

emergencyComplete.desc: Button label shown on the final step of a guided meditation or CBT walkthrough. Keep the ✓ checkmark.

breathChooseTitle.desc: Large serif title on the breathing pattern selection screen.

breathChooseSubtitle.en: A steady rhythm for this moment.
breathChooseSubtitle.desc: Subtitle under the breathing selection title.

breathLibraryTitle.desc: Section heading for the grid of breathing patterns on the selection screen.

breathMorePatterns.desc: Tappable link that opens the full breathing-pattern library.

breathRecommendedNow.desc: Uppercase badge on the recommended breathing-pattern card. Keep it uppercase.

breathRhythmIn.desc: Rhythm chip label for the inhale phase duration on the recommended breathing card.

breathRhythmHold.desc: Rhythm chip label for a breath-hold phase duration on the recommended breathing card.

breathRhythmOut.desc: Rhythm chip label for the exhale phase duration on the recommended breathing card.

breathBegin.desc: Button that starts the recommended breathing session.

breathSessionTitle.desc: Serif title at the top of the active breathing-session screen.

breathSessionSubtitle.desc: Calming subtitle under the breathing-session title.

breathReady.desc: Word shown in the breathing ring before the session is started.

breathRemaining.desc: Caption under the session countdown timer (e.g. '4:32 remaining'). Lowercase.

breathStart.desc: Button that begins the breathing-session countdown.

breathResume.desc: Button that resumes a paused breathing session.

breathPause.desc: Button that pauses the active breathing session.

breathEndSession.desc: Outlined button that ends the breathing session and returns to the pattern list.

breathDizzyWarning.en: If you feel dizzy, return to normal breathing.
breathDizzyWarning.desc: Safety footer shown during a breathing session.

breathAllPatternsTitle.desc: Serif title on the full breathing-pattern library screen.

breathAllPatternsSubtitle.en: Find the rhythm that fits this moment.
breathAllPatternsSubtitle.desc: Subtitle under the full breathing-library title.

meditationGuidedAudioLabel.desc: Uppercase badge on the Urge Surfing guided-audio player card. Keep it uppercase.

meditationGuidedScripts.desc: Divider label separating the audio player from the text-based guided meditation list.

meditationUrgeSurfingTagline.en: Ride the wave — urges peak and pass.
meditationUrgeSurfingTagline.desc: Tagline under the Urge Surfing audio title. Keep the em dash.

meditationUrgeSurfingExplainer.en: Urge surfing: instead of fighting a craving, you observe it like a wave — it rises, peaks, and falls on its own. This guided session teaches you to ride the wave without acting on it.
meditationUrgeSurfingExplainer.desc: Explainer paragraph describing what urge surfing is, shown under the audio player.

meditationDuration8min.desc: Duration label for an 8-minute guided meditation.

meditationDuration10min.desc: Duration label for a 10-minute guided meditation.

meditationDuration12min.desc: Duration label for a 12-minute guided meditation.

meditationDuration15min.desc: Duration label for a 15-minute guided meditation.

meditationUrgeSurfingTitle.desc: Title of the Urge Surfing guided meditation.

meditationUrgeSurfingStep0.en: Close your eyes and take three slow breaths.

meditationUrgeSurfingStep1.en: Notice the craving. Where do you feel it in your body?

meditationUrgeSurfingStep2.en: Imagine it as a wave in the ocean — rising slowly.
meditationUrgeSurfingStep2.desc: Urge Surfing meditation step 3 of 7. Keep the em dash.

meditationUrgeSurfingStep3.en: You are a surfer. You don't fight the wave. You ride it.

meditationUrgeSurfingStep4.en: Watch the wave peak. It cannot go higher than it already is.

meditationUrgeSurfingStep5.en: Now watch it begin to fall. Urges always fade.

meditationUrgeSurfingStep6.en: You did not drink. The wave passed. You surfed it.

meditationBodyScanTitle.desc: Title of the Body Scan guided meditation.

meditationBodyScanStep0.en: Lie down or sit comfortably. Close your eyes.

meditationBodyScanStep1.en: Bring attention to your feet. Notice any sensation — warmth, tingling.
meditationBodyScanStep1.desc: Body Scan meditation step 2 of 7. Keep the em dash.

meditationBodyScanStep2.en: Slowly move up to your calves, then knees, then thighs.

meditationBodyScanStep3.en: Notice your belly rising and falling with each breath.

meditationBodyScanStep4.en: Scan your chest, shoulders, arms, and hands.

meditationBodyScanStep5.en: Finally, relax your jaw, eyes, and forehead.

meditationBodyScanStep6.en: Rest here for a moment. You are safe. You are whole.

meditationGratitudeResetTitle.desc: Title of the Gratitude Reset guided meditation.

meditationGratitudeResetStep0.en: Sit quietly. Take three slow breaths.

meditationGratitudeResetStep1.en: Think of one person in your life you're grateful for.

meditationGratitudeResetStep2.en: What did they do or say that mattered to you?

meditationGratitudeResetStep3.en: Think of one moment from today, however small, that was good.

meditationGratitudeResetStep4.en: Think of something about your body or health you appreciate.

meditationGratitudeResetStep5.en: Let gratitude fill your chest like warmth.

meditationGratitudeResetStep6.en: Carry this feeling into your next hour.

meditationSafePlaceTitle.desc: Title of the Safe Place guided meditation.

meditationSafePlaceStep0.en: Close your eyes. Take three slow, deep breaths.

meditationSafePlaceStep1.en: Imagine a place where you feel completely safe.

meditationSafePlaceStep2.en: It can be real or imagined — a beach, a forest, a room.
meditationSafePlaceStep2.desc: Safe Place meditation step 3 of 7. Keep the em dash.

meditationSafePlaceStep3.en: Notice what you see, hear, smell in this place.

meditationSafePlaceStep4.en: Feel the ground beneath you. You are supported.

meditationSafePlaceStep5.en: Breathe here for a while. Nothing can harm you.

meditationSafePlaceStep6.en: When you're ready, slowly return, carrying this calm.

meditationSelfCompassionTitle.desc: Title of the Self-Compassion guided meditation.

meditationSelfCompassionStep0.en: Place your hand on your heart. Feel its warmth.

meditationSelfCompassionStep1.en: Say: "This is a moment of difficulty."
meditationSelfCompassionStep1.desc: Self-Compassion meditation step 2 of 7. Keep the quotation marks.

meditationSelfCompassionStep2.en: Say: "Difficulty is part of life. I am not alone in this."
meditationSelfCompassionStep2.desc: Self-Compassion meditation step 3 of 7. Keep the quotation marks.

meditationSelfCompassionStep3.en: Say: "May I be kind to myself right now."
meditationSelfCompassionStep3.desc: Self-Compassion meditation step 4 of 7. Keep the quotation marks.

meditationSelfCompassionStep4.en: Think of something you've been critical of yourself about.

meditationSelfCompassionStep5.en: Ask: what would I say to a dear friend in this situation?

meditationSelfCompassionStep6.en: Say those words to yourself. You deserve them too.

emergencyCloseGuide.desc: Button that closes the open CBT guide walkthrough. Keep the ✕ symbol.

cbtGuideThoughtsHint.desc: Placeholder text for the free-text field where the user writes their reflection during a CBT guide step.

cbtGuideStepCount.desc: Number of steps in a CBT guide, shown under the guide title in the list.

reasonsWhyHeading.desc: Italic heading at the top of the My Reasons tab, framing the user's personal reasons for recovery.

reasonsEmptyHint.en: Add your reasons in Settings → My Motivation. Reading them during a craving can be powerful.
reasonsEmptyHint.desc: Empty-state message on the My Reasons tab when the user has not added any reasons yet.

haltCheckInPrompt.en: Before acting on a craving, check in:
haltCheckInPrompt.desc: Intro line above the HALT (Hungry/Angry/Lonely/Tired) self-check list.

playTapeHeroHeading.en:
Pause for a moment.
Look at what happens next.
playTapeHeroHeading.desc: Hero heading on the Play the Tape tab. Keep the line break.

playTapeIntro.en: An urge can feel urgent, but it is temporary. Before you act, walk yourself through the next few moments, tonight, and tomorrow morning.
playTapeIntro.desc: Intro paragraph on the Play the Tape tab explaining the exercise.

playTapeDrinkTitle.desc: Title of the card showing consequences of drinking, on the Play the Tape tab.

playTapeSoberTitle.desc: Title of the card showing benefits of staying sober, on the Play the Tape tab.

playTapePhaseRightNow.desc: Timeline row label (immediate timeframe) within a Play the Tape consequence card.

playTapePhaseTonight.desc: Timeline row label (evening timeframe) within a Play the Tape consequence card.

playTapePhaseTomorrow.desc: Timeline row label (next-day timeframe) within a Play the Tape consequence card.

playTapeDrinkNow0.desc: Bullet under 'Right now' in the 'If I drink now' card.

playTapeDrinkNow1.en: The craving softens for a little while
playTapeDrinkNow1.desc: Bullet under 'Right now' in the 'If I drink now' card.

playTapeDrinkTonight0.desc: Bullet under 'Later tonight' in the 'If I drink now' card.

playTapeDrinkTonight1.desc: Bullet under 'Later tonight' in the 'If I drink now' card.

playTapeDrinkTonight2.desc: Bullet under 'Later tonight' in the 'If I drink now' card.

playTapeDrinkTomorrow0.desc: Bullet under 'Tomorrow' in the 'If I drink now' card.

playTapeDrinkTomorrow1.en: The next day asks more of me
playTapeDrinkTomorrow1.desc: Bullet under 'Tomorrow' in the 'If I drink now' card.

playTapeDrinkTomorrow2.desc: Bullet under 'Tomorrow' in the 'If I drink now' card.

playTapeSoberNow0.desc: Bullet under 'Right now' in the 'If I stay sober' card.

playTapeSoberNow1.en: I give myself space instead of reacting
playTapeSoberNow1.desc: Bullet under 'Right now' in the 'If I stay sober' card.

playTapeSoberTonight0.desc: Bullet under 'Later tonight' in the 'If I stay sober' card.

playTapeSoberTonight1.en: I go to bed with clarity
playTapeSoberTonight1.desc: Bullet under 'Later tonight' in the 'If I stay sober' card.

playTapeSoberTonight2.desc: Bullet under 'Later tonight' in the 'If I stay sober' card.

playTapeSoberTomorrow0.desc: Bullet under 'Tomorrow' in the 'If I stay sober' card.

playTapeSoberTomorrow1.desc: Bullet under 'Tomorrow' in the 'If I stay sober' card.

playTapeSoberTomorrow2.desc: Bullet under 'Tomorrow' in the 'If I stay sober' card.

playTapeWhatHelpsTitle.desc: Title of the action card offering coping tools on the Play the Tape tab.

playTapeActionBreathe.desc: Action button that opens the breathing exercise.

playTapeActionJournal.desc: Action button that opens the journal.

playTapeActionReason.desc: Action button that opens the My Reasons tab.

playTapeActionRideWave.desc: Action button that opens the urge timer.
